business.name: Commercial Landscape Services
business.tagline: Professional grounds keeping that works as hard as you do

hero.headline: *Every property* tells a story — make yours legendary
hero.subheadline: Commercial grounds that work for your business, not against it. Licensed team, reliable schedules, results that last.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything your property needs
services_section.subheading: From weekly maintenance to seasonal cleanups — one team, one standard

services.title: Commercial Lawn Care
services.description: Weekly mowing, edging, and trimming that keeps your business looking sharp year-round.

services.title: Landscape Maintenance
services.description: Pruning, mulching, and plant care to keep your grounds healthy and professional.

services.title: Seasonal Cleanup
services.description: Spring prep and fall cleanup services that prepare your property for every season.

services.title: Property Enhancement
services.description: Planting, bed renovation, and landscape improvements that boost your curb appeal.

about.heading: Built for Huntsville businesses
about.body: We're a Huntsville landscaping team that shows up when scheduled and does what we promise. Your property gets the attention it deserves — every single time.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Huntsville and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional landscaping services throughout North Alabama

cta.heading: Ready to transform your commercial property?
cta.body: Get a detailed quote tailored to your property's needs. No surprises, just honest pricing and reliable service you can count on.
